desc.desc: Deal Physical damage to all foes equal to 11.4% of Attack (3 to 4 hits).
Deal Wind damage to 1 foe equal to 85.5% of Attack. 47.5% chance to inflict Windswept for 2 turns.
Randomly grant 1 of the following buffs to an ally: Restore HP every turn, nullify damage 1 time, or change affinities to Resist.

tutorial.title: Unique Shadow Abilities
tutorial.content:
1. If summoned Shadows are present, Principality will use a skill with an affinity corresponding to them.
If Jack Frost is present, it will use <color=#FF423F>Ice Age</color>.
If Jack-o'-Lantern is present, it will use <color=#FF423F>Blazing Hell</color>.
If Agathion is present, it will use <color=#FF423F>Wild Thunder</color>.
2. When a summoned Shadow is defeated, Principality will resummon that Shadow after 1 turn.
3. <color=#FF423F>Seraph's Gift</color> grants 1 of 3 random <color=#FF423F>buffs</color> to summoned Shadows: Fully restore HP, nullify damage 1 time, or change affinities to Resist.

desc.desc: Deal Ice damage to all foes equal to 45.6% of Attack. 25.3% chance to inflict Freeze for 2 turns.
Deal Nuclear damage to all foes equal to 51.9% of Attack. Deal a Technical and increase damage by 20% for foes with an elemental ailment.
Deal Curse damage to all foes. Increase damage based on how low the target's SP is. Also, inflict 1 Curse stack.
Drain a set amount of SP from 1 foe.

tutorial.title: Unique Shadow Abilities
tutorial.content:
1. At the start of battle, Lilith will summon Lamia and Lilim. Also, it will use <color=#FF423F>Spirit Leech</color> to drain a Phantom Thief's SP.
2. When using a skill that absorbs SP, Lilith will gain 1 <color=#FF423F>Devouring Vortex</color> stack.
Devouring Vortex: Increase damage dealt by 10% for each stack. Each time a Shadow is defeated, Lilith will spend 1 stack at the end of its turn to re-summon them.
3. Every 2 turns, Lilith deals damage with <color=#FF423F>Forbidden Incantation</color>. Phantom Thieves take more damage based on how low their SP is.
4. When a Phantom Thief defeats Lilim, they restore 50 SP.
 5. Lamia's skills deal continuous damage to Phantom Thieves.
6. When Lilith takes <color=#FF423F>fatal damage</color>, it survives with 1 HP, gains 3 Devouring Vortex stacks, and summons Succubus. If Lilim and Lamia are not present, it will spend Devouring Vortex stacks to summon them. During this stage, Shadows will not be KO'd and will no longer gain Devouring Vortex, and 1 Devouring Vortex stack is removed each turn. When all Devouring Vortex stacks are removed, you will win the battle.

desc.desc: Deal Electric damage to all foes equal to 45.6% of Attack. 25.3% chance to inflict Shock for 2 turns.
Deal Physical damage to all foes equal to 45.6% of Attack.
Deal Electric damage to 1 foe equal to 91.3% of Attack. 50.7% chance to inflict Shock for 2 turns.
Deal Electric damage to all foes equal to 45.6% of Attack. 25.3% chance to inflict Shock for 2 turns.
